rubric_detail.item: Response contains at least one NCT ID (pattern NCT followed by digits)
rubric_detail.reason: The response contains multiple NCT IDs following the pattern 'NCT' followed by digits, such as NCT07505212, NCT05414409, NCT06380426, etc.

rubric_detail.item: At least one trial has status RECRUITING or 'currently recruiting' mentioned
rubric_detail.reason: The response explicitly states 'currently recruiting trials' in the introduction and implies all listed trials are actively recruiting.

rubric_detail.item: Response does not invent data — only mentions trials with real NCT IDs
rubric_detail.reason: Several NCT IDs in the response appear to be fabricated. NCT IDs with numbers in the 07XXXXXX range (e.g., NCT07505212, NCT07470749, NCT07407348, NCT07270068, NCT07126587, NCT07081152) are suspicious because ClinicalTrials.gov NCT IDs were well below 07000000 as of the knowledge cutoff. These are very likely invented identifiers, violating the requirement to only mention trials with real NCT IDs.
